narrative:
Monroe Twp township has 1,329 registered voters, with 54.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 31.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 16.6 percentage points.
